What I bring
01
Systems Thinker

I design from data model to deploy. Architecture decisions, API contracts, and scaling tradeoffs are where I thrive.

02
Business-Aware

I understand retention loops, unit economics, and why shipping fast often beats shipping perfect.

03
Full-Stack Builder

From DB schema to UI component — I own the full product. No handoff friction, no translation loss.
